templates.template: Template Customizado - Server Dell iDRAC SNMP
templates.name: Template Customizado - Server Dell iDRAC SNMP
templates.description:
Template Server iDRAC

MIBs used:
IDRAC-MIB-SMIv2

Template tooling version used: 0.36

items.name: Firmware version
items.description:
MIB: IDRAC-MIB-SMIv2
This attribute defines the firmware version of a remote access card.

triggers.expression: (last(/Template Customizado - Server Dell iDRAC SNMP/system.hw.firmware,#1)<>last(/Template Customizado - Server Dell iDRAC SNMP/system.hw.firmware,#2))=1 and length(last(/Template Customizado - Server Dell iDRAC SNMP/system.hw.firmware))>0
triggers.name: Firmware has changed
triggers.description: Firmware version has changed. Ack to close

items.name: Hardware model name
items.description:
MIB: IDRAC-MIB-SMIv2
This attribute defines the model name of the system.

items.name: Hardware serial number
items.description:
MIB: IDRAC-MIB-SMIv2
This attribute defines the service tag of the system.

triggers.expression: (last(/Template Customizado - Server Dell iDRAC SNMP/system.hw.serialnumber,#1)<>last(/Template Customizado - Server Dell iDRAC SNMP/system.hw.serialnumber,#2))=1 and length(last(/Template Customizado - Server Dell iDRAC SNMP/system.hw.serialnumber))>0
triggers.name: Device has been replaced (new serial number received)
triggers.description: Device serial number has changed. Ack to close

items.name: Overall system health status
items.description:
MIB: IDRAC-MIB-SMIv2
This attribute defines the overall rollup status of all components in the system being monitored by the remote access card. Includes system, storage, IO devices, iDRAC, CPU, memory, etc.

triggers.name: System is in unrecoverable state!
triggers.description: Please check the device for faults

triggers.name: System status is in critical state
triggers.description: Please check the device for errors

triggers.name: System status is in warning state
triggers.description: Please check the device for warnings

dependencies.name: System status is in critical state

item_prototypes.name: Battery {#BATTERY_NUM}: Disk array cache controller battery status
item_prototypes.description:
MIB: IDRAC-MIB-SMIv2
Current state of battery.
Possible values:
1: The current state could not be determined.
2: The battery is operating normally.
3: The battery has failed and needs to be replaced.
4: The battery temperature is high or charge level is depleting.
5: The battery is missing or not detected.
6: The battery is undergoing the re-charge phase.
7: The battery voltage or charge level is below the threshold.

trigger_prototypes.name: Battery {#BATTERY_NUM}: Disk array cache controller battery is in critical state!
trigger_prototypes.description: Please check the device for faults

trigger_prototypes.name: Battery {#BATTERY_NUM}: Disk array cache controller battery is in warning state
trigger_prototypes.description: Please check the device for faults

dependencies.name: Battery {#BATTERY_NUM}: Disk array cache controller battery is in critical state!

trigger_prototypes.name: Battery {#BATTERY_NUM}: Disk array cache controller battery is not in optimal state
trigger_prototypes.description: Please check the device for faults

dependencies.name: Battery {#BATTERY_NUM}: Disk array cache controller battery is in critical state!
Battery {#BATTERY_NUM}: Disk array cache controller battery is in warning state

item_prototypes.name: {#FAN_DESCR}: Fan speed
item_prototypes.description:
MIB: IDRAC-MIB-SMIv2
0700.0012.0001.0006 This attribute defines the reading for a cooling device
of subtype other than coolingDeviceSubTypeIsDiscrete.  When the value
for coolingDeviceSubType is other than coolingDeviceSubTypeIsDiscrete, the
value returned for this attribute is the speed in RPM or the OFF/ON value
of the cooling device.  When the value for coolingDeviceSubType is
coolingDeviceSubTypeIsDiscrete, a value is not returned for this attribute.

item_prototypes.name: {#FAN_DESCR}: Fan status
item_prototypes.description:
MIB: IDRAC-MIB-SMIv2
0700.0012.0001.0005 This attribute defines the probe status of the cooling device.

trigger_prototypes.expression: count(/Template Customizado - Server Dell iDRAC SNMP/sensor.fan.status[coolingDeviceStatus.{#SNMPINDEX}],#1,"eq","{$FAN_CRIT_STATUS:\"criticalUpper\"}")=1 or count(/Template Customizado - Server Dell iDRAC SNMP/sensor.fan.status[coolingDeviceStatus.{#SNMPINDEX}],#1,"eq","{$FAN_CRIT_STATUS:\"nonRecoverableUpper\"}")=1 or count(/Template Customizado - Server Dell iDRAC SNMP/sensor.fan.status[coolingDeviceStatus.{#SNMPINDEX}],#1,"eq","{$FAN_CRIT_STATUS:\"criticalLower\"}")=1 or count(/Template Customizado - Server Dell iDRAC SNMP/sensor.fan.status[coolingDeviceStatus.{#SNMPINDEX}],#1,"eq","{$FAN_CRIT_STATUS:\"nonRecoverableLower\"}")=1 or count(/Template Customizado - Server Dell iDRAC SNMP/sensor.fan.status[coolingDeviceStatus.{#SNMPINDEX}],#1,"eq","{$FAN_CRIT_STATUS:\"failed\"}")=1
trigger_prototypes.name: {#FAN_DESCR}: Fan is in critical state
trigger_prototypes.description: Please check the fan unit

trigger_prototypes.expression: count(/Template Customizado - Server Dell iDRAC SNMP/sensor.fan.status[coolingDeviceStatus.{#SNMPINDEX}],#1,"eq","{$FAN_WARN_STATUS:\"nonCriticalUpper\"}")=1 or count(/Template Customizado - Server Dell iDRAC SNMP/sensor.fan.status[coolingDeviceStatus.{#SNMPINDEX}],#1,"eq","{$FAN_WARN_STATUS:\"nonCriticalLower\"}")=1
trigger_prototypes.name: {#FAN_DESCR}: Fan is in warning state
trigger_prototypes.description: Please check the fan unit

dependencies.name: {#FAN_DESCR}: Fan is in critical state
dependencies.expression: count(/Template Customizado - Server Dell iDRAC SNMP/sensor.fan.status[coolingDeviceStatus.{#SNMPINDEX}],#1,"eq","{$FAN_CRIT_STATUS:\"criticalUpper\"}")=1 or count(/Template Customizado - Server Dell iDRAC SNMP/sensor.fan.status[coolingDeviceStatus.{#SNMPINDEX}],#1,"eq","{$FAN_CRIT_STATUS:\"nonRecoverableUpper\"}")=1 or count(/Template Customizado - Server Dell iDRAC SNMP/sensor.fan.status[coolingDeviceStatus.{#SNMPINDEX}],#1,"eq","{$FAN_CRIT_STATUS:\"criticalLower\"}")=1 or count(/Template Customizado - Server Dell iDRAC SNMP/sensor.fan.status[coolingDeviceStatus.{#SNMPINDEX}],#1,"eq","{$FAN_CRIT_STATUS:\"nonRecoverableLower\"}")=1 or count(/Template Customizado - Server Dell iDRAC SNMP/sensor.fan.status[coolingDeviceStatus.{#SNMPINDEX}],#1,"eq","{$FAN_CRIT_STATUS:\"failed\"}")=1

item_prototypes.name: {#CNTLR_NAME}: Disk array controller model
item_prototypes.description:
MIB: IDRAC-MIB-SMIv2
The controller's name as represented in Storage Management.

item_prototypes.name: {#CNTLR_NAME}: Disk array controller status
item_prototypes.description:
MIB: IDRAC-MIB-SMIv2
The status of the controller itself without the propagation of any contained component status.
Possible values:
1: Other
2: Unknown
3: OK
4: Non-critical
5: Critical
6: Non-recoverable

trigger_prototypes.name: {#CNTLR_NAME}: Disk array controller is in critical state
trigger_prototypes.description: Please check the device for faults

dependencies.name: {#CNTLR_NAME}: Disk array controller is in unrecoverable state!

trigger_prototypes.name: {#CNTLR_NAME}: Disk array controller is in unrecoverable state!
trigger_prototypes.description: Please check the device for faults

trigger_prototypes.name: {#CNTLR_NAME}: Disk array controller is in warning state
trigger_prototypes.description: Please check the device for faults

dependencies.name: {#CNTLR_NAME}: Disk array controller is in critical state
{#CNTLR_NAME}: Disk array controller is in unrecoverable state!

item_prototypes.name: {#DISK_NAME}: Physical disk media type
item_prototypes.description:
MIB: IDRAC-MIB-SMIv2
The media type of the physical disk. Possible Values:
1: The media type could not be determined.
2: Hard Disk Drive (HDD).
3: Solid State Drive (SSD).

item_prototypes.name: {#DISK_NAME}: Physical disk model name
item_prototypes.description:
MIB: IDRAC-MIB-SMIv2
The model number of the physical disk.

item_prototypes.name: {#DISK_NAME}: Physical disk part number
item_prototypes.description:
MIB: IDRAC-MIB-SMIv2
The part number of the disk.

item_prototypes.name: {#DISK_NAME}: Physical disk serial number
item_prototypes.description:
MIB: IDRAC-MIB-SMIv2
The physical disk's unique identification number from the manufacturer.

trigger_prototypes.expression: (last(/Template Customizado - Server Dell iDRAC SNMP/system.hw.physicaldisk.serialnumber[physicalDiskSerialNo.{#SNMPINDEX}],#1)<>last(/Template Customizado - Server Dell iDRAC SNMP/system.hw.physicaldisk.serialnumber[physicalDiskSerialNo.{#SNMPINDEX}],#2))=1 and length(last(/Template Customizado - Server Dell iDRAC SNMP/system.hw.physicaldisk.serialnumber[physicalDiskSerialNo.{#SNMPINDEX}]))>0
trigger_prototypes.name: {#DISK_NAME}: Disk has been replaced (new serial number received)
trigger_prototypes.description: Disk serial number has changed. Ack to close

item_prototypes.name: {#DISK_NAME}: Disk size
item_prototypes.description:
MIB: IDRAC-MIB-SMIv2
The size of the physical disk in megabytes.

item_prototypes.name: {#DISK_NAME}: Physical disk S.M.A.R.T. status
item_prototypes.description:
MIB: IDRAC-MIB-SMIv2
Indicates whether the physical disk has received a predictive failure alert.

trigger_prototypes.name: {#DISK_NAME}: Physical disk S.M.A.R.T. failed
trigger_prototypes.description: Disk probably requires replacement.

dependencies.name: {#DISK_NAME}: Physical disk failed
dependencies.expression: count(/Template Customizado - Server Dell iDRAC SNMP/system.hw.physicaldisk.status[physicalDiskComponentStatus.{#SNMPINDEX}],#1,"eq","{$DISK_FAIL_STATUS:\"critical\"}")=1 or count(/Template Customizado - Server Dell iDRAC SNMP/system.hw.physicaldisk.status[physicalDiskComponentStatus.{#SNMPINDEX}],#1,"eq","{$DISK_FAIL_STATUS:\"nonRecoverable\"}")=1

item_prototypes.name: {#DISK_NAME}: Physical disk status
item_prototypes.description:
MIB: IDRAC-MIB-SMIv2
The status of the physical disk itself without the propagation of any contained component status.
Possible values:
1: Other
2: Unknown
3: OK
4: Non-critical
5: Critical
6: Non-recoverable

trigger_prototypes.expression: count(/Template Customizado - Server Dell iDRAC SNMP/system.hw.physicaldisk.status[physicalDiskComponentStatus.{#SNMPINDEX}],#1,"eq","{$DISK_FAIL_STATUS:\"critical\"}")=1 or count(/Template Customizado - Server Dell iDRAC SNMP/system.hw.physicaldisk.status[physicalDiskComponentStatus.{#SNMPINDEX}],#1,"eq","{$DISK_FAIL_STATUS:\"nonRecoverable\"}")=1
trigger_prototypes.name: {#DISK_NAME}: Physical disk failed
trigger_prototypes.description: Please check physical disk for warnings or errors

trigger_prototypes.name: {#DISK_NAME}: Physical disk is in warning state
trigger_prototypes.description: Please check physical disk for warnings or errors

dependencies.name: {#DISK_NAME}: Physical disk failed
dependencies.expression: count(/Template Customizado - Server Dell iDRAC SNMP/system.hw.physicaldisk.status[physicalDiskComponentStatus.{#SNMPINDEX}],#1,"eq","{$DISK_FAIL_STATUS:\"critical\"}")=1 or count(/Template Customizado - Server Dell iDRAC SNMP/system.hw.physicaldisk.status[physicalDiskComponentStatus.{#SNMPINDEX}],#1,"eq","{$DISK_FAIL_STATUS:\"nonRecoverable\"}")=1

item_prototypes.name: {#PSU_DESCR}: Power supply status
item_prototypes.description:
MIB: IDRAC-MIB-SMIv2
0600.0012.0001.0005 This attribute defines the status of the power supply.

trigger_prototypes.expression: count(/Template Customizado - Server Dell iDRAC SNMP/sensor.psu.status[powerSupplyStatus.{#SNMPINDEX}],#1,"eq","{$PSU_CRIT_STATUS:\"critical\"}")=1 or count(/Template Customizado - Server Dell iDRAC SNMP/sensor.psu.status[powerSupplyStatus.{#SNMPINDEX}],#1,"eq","{$PSU_CRIT_STATUS:\"nonRecoverable\"}")=1
trigger_prototypes.name: {#PSU_DESCR}: Power supply is in critical state
trigger_prototypes.description: Please check the power supply unit for errors

trigger_prototypes.name: {#PSU_DESCR}: Power supply is in warning state
trigger_prototypes.description: Please check the power supply unit for errors

dependencies.name: {#PSU_DESCR}: Power supply is in critical state
dependencies.expression: count(/Template Customizado - Server Dell iDRAC SNMP/sensor.psu.status[powerSupplyStatus.{#SNMPINDEX}],#1,"eq","{$PSU_CRIT_STATUS:\"critical\"}")=1 or count(/Template Customizado - Server Dell iDRAC SNMP/sensor.psu.status[powerSupplyStatus.{#SNMPINDEX}],#1,"eq","{$PSU_CRIT_STATUS:\"nonRecoverable\"}")=1

discovery_rules.name: Temperature Ambient Discovery
discovery_rules.description: Scanning table of Temperature Probe Table IDRAC-MIB-SMIv2::temperatureProbeTable

item_prototypes.name: {#SENSOR_LOCALE}: Temperature status
item_prototypes.description:
MIB: IDRAC-MIB-SMIv2
0700.0020.0001.0005 This attribute defines the probe status of the temperature probe.

item_prototypes.name: {#SENSOR_LOCALE}: Temperature
item_prototypes.description:
MIB: IDRAC-MIB-SMIv2
0700.0020.0001.0006 This attribute defines the reading for a temperature probe of type other than temperatureProbeTypeIsDiscrete.  When the value for temperatureProbeType is other than temperatureProbeTypeIsDiscrete,the value returned for this attribute is the temperature that the probeis reading in tenths of degrees Centigrade. When the value for temperatureProbeType is temperatureProbeTypeIsDiscrete, a value is not returned for this attribute.

trigger_prototypes.name: {#SENSOR_LOCALE}: Temperature is too low: <{$TEMP_CRIT_LOW:"Ambient"}
{#SENSOR_LOCALE}: Temperature is above critical threshold: >{$TEMP_CRIT:"Ambient"}
trigger_prototypes.description: This trigger uses temperature sensor values as well as temperature sensor status if available

trigger_prototypes.name: {#SENSOR_LOCALE}: Temperature is above warning threshold: >{$TEMP_WARN:"Ambient"}
trigger_prototypes.description: This trigger uses temperature sensor values as well as temperature sensor status if available

dependencies.name: {#SENSOR_LOCALE}: Temperature is above critical threshold: >{$TEMP_CRIT:"Ambient"}

discovery_rules.description: Scanning table of Temperature Probe Table IDRAC-MIB-SMIv2::temperatureProbeTable

item_prototypes.name: {#SENSOR_LOCALE}: Temperature status
item_prototypes.description:
MIB: IDRAC-MIB-SMIv2
0700.0020.0001.0005 This attribute defines the probe status of the temperature probe.

item_prototypes.name: {#SENSOR_LOCALE}: Temperature
item_prototypes.description:
MIB: IDRAC-MIB-SMIv2
0700.0020.0001.0006 This attribute defines the reading for a temperature probe of type other than temperatureProbeTypeIsDiscrete.  When the value for temperatureProbeType is other than temperatureProbeTypeIsDiscrete,the value returned for this attribute is the temperature that the probeis reading in tenths of degrees Centigrade. When the value for temperatureProbeType is temperatureProbeTypeIsDiscrete, a value is not returned for this attribute.

trigger_prototypes.name: {#SENSOR_LOCALE}: Temperature is too low: <{$TEMP_CRIT_LOW:"CPU"}
{#SENSOR_LOCALE}: Temperature is above critical threshold: >{$TEMP_CRIT:"CPU"}
trigger_prototypes.description: This trigger uses temperature sensor values as well as temperature sensor status if available

item_prototypes.name: Disk {#SNMPVALUE}({#DISK_NAME}): Layout type
item_prototypes.description:
MIB: IDRAC-MIB-SMIv2
The virtual disk's RAID type.
Possible values:
1: Not one of the following
2: RAID-0
3: RAID-1
4: RAID-5
5: RAID-6
6: RAID-10
7: RAID-50
8: RAID-60
9: Concatenated RAID 1
10: Concatenated RAID 5

item_prototypes.name: Disk {#SNMPVALUE}({#DISK_NAME}): Read policy
item_prototypes.description:
MIB: IDRAC-MIB-SMIv2
The read policy used by the controller for read operations on this virtual disk.
Possible values:
1: No Read Ahead.
2: Read Ahead.
3: Adaptive Read Ahead.

item_prototypes.name: Disk {#SNMPVALUE}({#DISK_NAME}): Disk size
item_prototypes.description:
MIB: IDRAC-MIB-SMIv2
The size of the virtual disk in megabytes.

item_prototypes.name: Disk {#SNMPVALUE}({#DISK_NAME}): Current state
item_prototypes.description:
MIB: IDRAC-MIB-SMIv2
The state of the virtual disk when there are progressive operations ongoing.
Possible values:
1: There is no active operation running.
2: The virtual disk configuration has changed. The physical disks included in the virtual disk are being modified to support the new configuration.
3: A Consistency Check (CC) is being performed on the virtual disk.
4: The virtual disk is being initialized.
5: BackGround Initialization (BGI) is being performed on the virtual disk.

item_prototypes.name: Disk {#SNMPVALUE}({#DISK_NAME}): Status
item_prototypes.description:
MIB: IDRAC-MIB-SMIv2
The current state of this virtual disk (which includes any member physical disks.)
Possible states:
1: The current state could not be determined.
2: The virtual disk is operating normally or optimally.
3: The virtual disk has encountered a failure. The data on disk is lost or is about to be lost.
4: The virtual disk encounterd a failure with one or all of the constituent redundant physical disks.
The data on the virtual disk might no longer be fault tolerant.

trigger_prototypes.name: Disk {#SNMPVALUE}({#DISK_NAME}): Virtual disk failed
trigger_prototypes.description: Please check virtual disk for warnings or errors

trigger_prototypes.name: Disk {#SNMPVALUE}({#DISK_NAME}): Virtual disk is in warning state
trigger_prototypes.description: Please check virtual disk for warnings or errors

item_prototypes.name: Disk {#SNMPVALUE}({#DISK_NAME}): Write policy
item_prototypes.description:
MIB: IDRAC-MIB-SMIv2
The write policy used by the controller for write operations on this virtual disk.
Possible values:
1: Write Through.
2: Write Back.
3: Force Write Back.
